title: Unified Report Frontmatter v1
description: JSONSchema for the YAML frontmatter that every unified report (PR-D5-F onward) must declare. PR-D5-E ships this schema + validator; PR-D5-F wires it into governance_emit.

schema_version.description: Frontmatter schema version. Currently fixed at 1.

dispatch_id.description: Stable dispatch identifier, matches dispatch metadata footer.

sub_provider.description: Sub-provider routing label (e.g. anthropic, openai, google, moonshot, deepseek, glm). Use 'none' when not applicable.

model.description: Concrete model identifier reported by the adapter.

terminal_id.description: Terminal slot identifier (e.g. T0, T1, W4).

role.description: Role profile that executed the dispatch (e.g. backend-developer, architect).

task_class.description: Coarse task classification used by routing (implementation|review|gate|test|docs|...).

pr_id.description: PR identifier (PR-D5-E) or 'none' if not PR-scoped work.

token_usage.description: Token accounting reported by the adapter.

cost_usd.description: Estimated USD cost for the dispatch.

route_decision.description: Routing metadata captured at dispatch time (provider/model selection rationale).

strategy.description: Routing strategy label (e.g. default, override, fallback).
